commands.repair_reason: No ClawSweeper repair is needed unless new evidence reveals a code defect; the next action is contributor real-behavior proof followed by normal maintainer merge review.; Cleared: The diff only changes gateway CLI warning logic and colocated tests, with no dependency, CI, secret, auth, or package-resolution changes. (sha=dd6cca39769ab659cc3779c7b98adbdaf941c7ba)
commands.review_summary:
The PR changes gateway status warning construction to suppress `multiple_gateways` when all reachable probes report the same normalized self identity, with regression tests for same-identity and missing-identity probes.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level, but I did not run a live setup. Current main builds both `sshTunnel` and `configRemote` when URLs differ and emits `multiple_gateways` for any two reachable probes, matching the linked issue’s repro.
commands.review_followup: No ClawSweeper repair is needed unless new evidence reveals a code defect; the next action is contributor real-behavior proof followed by normal maintainer merge review.

target.title: fix(gateway): suppress duplicate probe warning for same identity (#69135)
target.body:
## Summary
- Suppress the `multiple_gateways` warning when every reachable gateway probe reports the same non-empty self identity.
- Keep the warning for missing identity data or distinct identities, so genuinely ambiguous multi-gateway setups still surface.
- Add regression coverage for same-identity SSH tunnel + configured remote probes and missing-identity fallback.

Fixes #69135.

## Validation
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/commands/gateway-status/output.test.ts` -> 1 file passed, 6 tests passed
- `pnpm lint -- src/commands/gateway-status/output.ts src/commands/gateway-status/output.test.ts` -> 0 warnings / 0 errors
- `git diff --check` -> clean
target.author: hclsys

commands.reason: PR is not opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
